title: Ghast Aircraft
body:
**Ghast Aircraft Mod Introduction**

Have you ever wanted to ride a Ghast aircraft as seen in the movies? This mod introduces a unique flying experience with the Ghast aircraft, which features 8 distinct speed modes. As the Ghast aircraft gathers power, it transitions to faster modes, allowing for an exhilarating ride.



**Power Accumulation**

The aircraft accumulates power as you move forward, holding down the forward key. The power that the Ghast Aircraft gathers can be stored unlimitedly.. However, if you stop moving forward, the Ghast aircraft will quickly start to lose its power, slowing down.



**Firing Fireballs**

You can use the accumulated power to launch fireballs by left-clicking. This action, however, will cause the Ghast to lose some of its power, resulting in a slower speed mode.



**Rescue Missions**

To obtain a Ghast aircraft, you can rescue them from structures found in the new biome or the Nether. During these missions, be cautious of the chained, huge Piglins that may pose a threat.
